message:
feat(conformance): add Double/Long support to printf executor

Extends PrintfArg enum with Double(c_double) and Long(c_longlong)
variants. Parsing now handles:
- Float values with fractional parts
- Large integers outside i32 range
- Special values: inf, -inf, nan as strings

This enables testing printf_conformance cases using %f, %e, %g, %lld.

Resolves: bd-4psb (partial)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
